verdict_reason: Configuration lacks Bean Validation constraints on nested records and critical fields; defaults silently allow invalid values that would cause runtime failures.

todos.issue: Nested record fields (poller and sns) lack @Valid and @NotNull constraints; inconsistent with sibling config classes like CdpConfig
todos.fix: Add @Valid @NotNull annotations to poller and sns fields to enforce validation of nested record fields, matching CdpConfig pattern (line 35-36)

todos.issue: Poller compact constructor does not validate intervalMs > 0; allows zero or negative values which would break scheduling
todos.fix: Add validation after intervalMs reassignment: if (intervalMs <= 0) throw new IllegalArgumentException(...) or use @Positive annotation

todos.issue: batchSize lacks validation; allows zero or negative values which would cause OutboxPublishService.publishUnpublishedEvents() to fail
todos.fix: Add validation: if (batchSize <= 0) batchSize = 10; then add constraint annotation @Positive

todos.issue: Empty string default for topicArn (line 26) allows silent configuration misses; should be validated to prevent runtime surprises in SNS publishing
todos.fix: Add @NotBlank constraint to Sns.topicArn() to validate at bootstrap and fail fast if not configured
